use_steer_prediction.description: flag for using steer prediction (do not use steer measurement)

use_delayed_initial_state.description: flag to use x0_delayed as initial state for predicted trajectory

trajectory_reference_mode.description: trajectory tracking mode: "spatial" (indexes the trajectory by distance) or "temporal" (uses the trajectory's time_from_start directly). Normally set once at the `autoware_trajectory_follower_node` level; declared here as well only as a fallback default for standalone use of this node.
